mnemonics.title: De Morgan's Laws
mnemonics.content: Break the line, change the sign: When distributing negation over ∧/∨, flip the operator

mnemonics.title: Implication
mnemonics.content: If p then q = Not p or q (→ becomes ∨ with ¬p)

acronyms.usage: Remember p ∨ T ≡ T and p ∧ F ≡ F
Works opposite to arithmetic: ∧ distributes over ∨ and vice versa

visualTips.visualization: Draw parallel columns for all possible T/F combinations
Imagine reducing logic gates using equivalence laws

analogies.analogy: Like different math expressions (2+2 vs 4) that evaluate to same value
Mathematical version of 'water is wet' - always true
